svg.title: GMS sleep, checkpoint, restore, and wake sequence
svg.desc: The worker releases its weight mappings while GMS retains the physical pages, the checkpoint runs without weights, and on restore the worker reconnects to a freshly populated GMS to remap the weights at their original addresses.
svg.text: Weights live in GMS, mapped at stable addresses in the worker
VA reservations kept; pages stay alive in GMS

g.text: Weights are not part of the checkpoint
Tensor pointers valid; CUDA graph still works
